CustomField.formula:
IF(Fulfill__c *20000<150, IMAGE("/img/samples/color_red.gif", "red", 15, Fulfill__c *20000 ) &LEFT(TEXT(Fulfill__c *10000),5)+"%",
IF(Fulfill__c *20000 < 200, IMAGE("/img/samples/color_yellow.gif", "yellow", 15,Fulfill__c *20000 )&LEFT(TEXT(Fulfill__c *10000),5)+"%",
IMAGE("/img/samples/color_green.gif", "green", 15, Fulfill__c *20000 )&LEFT(TEXT(Fulfill__c *10000),5)+"%"))
CustomField.label: Completion Bar
